subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Ḥusayn! Hearken unto the Call of God, the True and Just Sovereign, the All-Manifest. Verily, He maketh mention of thee from the precincts of the Prison [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبد الحسین اسمع ندآء الله الملک الحق العدل المبین انه یذکرک من شطر السجن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
